title: Modular VS Code extension runtime and package workflow UI

source.subject: refactor: modular extension runtime, commands, and package workflow UI

body:
Modular extension runtime, commands, and package workflow UI.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid_vscode`
- **Commit:** [`f6eceb6`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid_vscode/commit/f6eceb6)
- **Subject:** refactor: modular extension runtime, commands, and package workflow UI
- **Completed:** 2026-05-22

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.2 (Analysis, packages, and platform spec)
- **Workstream:** `editor-extension`
- **Deliverable:** `v02-editor-extension`
- **Domain:** `tooling`

## Relation
Contributes to deliverable **VS Code extension & Open VSX** (`v02-editor-extension`).
